title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Square Yards
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
